Package calendar.view

Interface CalendarView

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ConsoleView, SwingCalendarView
    public interface CalendarView
    Interface for calendar view operations. Abstracts OUTPUT ONLY - no input handling.

    The View layer is responsible ONLY for displaying information to the user. It does NOT:

    • Read user input (Controller's job)
    • Parse commands (Controller's job)
    • Perform business logic (Model's job)

    The View simply formats and displays data provided by the Controller.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void displayError​(java.lang.String error)
      Displays an error message to the user.
      void displayEvents​(java.util.List<CalendarEvent> events)
      Displays a list of events in a formatted manner.
      void displayMessage​(java.lang.String message)
      Displays a general message to the user.

    • Method Detail

      • displayMessage

        void displayMessage​(java.lang.String message)
        Displays a general message to the user.
        Parameters:
        message - the message to display

      • displayError

        void displayError​(java.lang.String error)
        Displays an error message to the user. Error messages should be visually distinct (e.g., "Error: " prefix).
        Parameters:
        error - the error message to display

      • displayEvents

        void displayEvents​(java.util.List<CalendarEvent> events)
        Displays a list of events in a formatted manner. If the list is empty, displays an appropriate "no events" message.
        Parameters:
        events - the list of events to display
